ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the climate data record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded climate data */,
  "glob" REAL /* Global temperature anomaly */,
  "nhem" REAL /* Temperature anomaly in the Northern Hemisphere */,
  "shem" REAL /* Temperature anomaly in the Southern Hemisphere */,
  "lat_24to90N" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 24N to 90N latitude */,
  "lat_24to24N" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 24S to 24N latitude */,
  "lat_90Sto24S" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 90S to 24S latitude */,
  "lat_64to90N" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 64N to 90N latitude */,
  "lat_44to64N" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 44N to 64N latitude */,
  "lat_24to44N" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 24N to 44N latitude */,
  "lat_equator_to24N" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from Equator to 24N latitude */,
  "lat_24StoEquator" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 24S to Equator latitude */,
  "lat_44Sto24S" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 44S to 24S latitude */,
  "lat_64Sto44S" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 64S to 44S latitude */,
  "lat_90Sto64S" REAL /* Temperature anomaly from 90S to 64S latitude */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the climate data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the climate data */,
  "latitude_band_id" INTEGER /* Latitude band associated with the climate data */,
  "hemisphere_id" INTEGER /* Hemisphere associated with the climate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_latitude_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("latitude_band_id") REFERENCES latitude_bands ("latitude_band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_hemisphere_id FOREIGN KEY ("hemisphere_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's geographical significance */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (hemisphere, latitude band, or global) */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the climate data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization affiliated with the user */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area of interest for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the climate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data record */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid (true/false) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the validation process */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual review, automated check) */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, monthly, ad-hoc) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, interactive visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latitude_bands" (
  "latitude_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the latitude band */,
  "latitude_band_name" TEXT /* Name of the latitude band */,
  "latitude_band_description" TEXT /* Description of the latitude band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latitude_band_id")
)
